Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I'm going to go get some medicine. I'll be right back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Oh, hey there! You on your way home from school?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Wow, you're really cute! From this angle, I can see how gorgeous you are in those glasses![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Say, you wanna maybe sit down at a café and chat a little?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Hey, c'mon, don't be scared. I'm not gonna bite![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Wait... Don't tell me that you're with her![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Psh, I thought I had a chance since she looked so plain...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Oh, thank goodness... I thought you were going to hit him for a second, {f 4 1}-san...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I wouldn't want you to get into a fight because of me... But just now, you were so... Um...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}What do you want? What're you glaring like that for anyways...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Wait... You're not with her, are you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}You're usually so quiet, {f 4 1}-san, but I guess you can be tough when you need to be.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Hngh... You've already saved me so I'm not scared anymore, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I-I'm so sorry... I... don't think I'm ready for this just yet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}...Oh, but at least I'm not shaking anymore. Thank you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 13 9 15 109}That does make me feel a lot better... Okay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}...Oh, that really did help calm me down a bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense Chihiro trusts me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Huh? Wh-Why do I... suddenly feel short of breath...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I think I really did catch a cold... I feel like my face is all flush.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}...Um... Thank you again for saving me today![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro hurried away...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to return to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
